query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_with_prereqs FROM game_quest_skill_catalog WHERE prerequisites IS NOT NULL AND prerequisites != 'null'; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_steps FROM game_quest_steps; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT skill_id) as skills_with_steps FROM game_quest_steps;
